title: SQL Injection via f-string query construction
diff:
diff --git a/auth.py b/auth.py
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -10,6 +10,12 @@ def authenticate(username, password):
     conn = get_db()
-    cursor = conn.cursor()
-    cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name=? AND pass=?", (username, password))
-    user = cursor.fetchone()
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='{username}' AND pass='{password}'"
+    cursor = conn.cursor()
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    user = cursor.fetchone()
     return user

ground_truth.description: SQL injection via f-string. User input directly interpolated into SQL query.
